---
name: Missing Model
about: Request support for a model that isn't in the database
labels: data, model
---

**Model name / HuggingFace ID**
<!-- e.g. meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B or mistral-7b-v0.3 -->

**Model type**
<!-- llm / detection / segmentation / classification / audio / image_generation -->

**Where can model metadata be found?**
<!-- Link to HuggingFace model card, paper, or official docs -->

**Do you have benchmark results for this model?**
<!-- If yes, consider submitting a PR with a JSONL record — see CONTRIBUTING.md -->
- [ ] Yes, I can provide benchmark data
- [ ] No, I just need the model recognized for memory-fit checks
